content.name: exec

arguments.command: node --input-type=module -e "import https from 'https'; const token=process.env.GHL_TOKEN||''; const location='TW8JsPW5NMnA3tfK2XLn'; function req(path){return new Promise((resolve,reject)=>{const r=https.request({hostname:'services.leadconnectorhq.com',path,method:'GET',headers:{Authorization:'Bearer '+token,Version:'2021-07-28','Content-Type':'application/json'}},res=>{let b='';res.on('data',d=>b+=d);res.on('end',()=>{try{resolve(JSON.parse(b));}catch{resolve({raw:b});}})});r.on('error',reject);r.end();});} const data=await req('/contacts/?locationId='+location+'&tags=ebook-buyer&limit=100'); const contacts=data.contacts||[]; const now=Date.now(); const day5=[]; const day7=[]; for(const c of contacts){ if((c.tags||[]).includes('course-buyer')) continue; const cf=c.customFields||[]; const pd=(cf.find(f=>f.key==='ebook_purchase_date')||{}).value; if(!pd) continue; const days=Math.floor((now-new Date(pd).getTime())/(24*60*60*1000)); const row={id:c.id,name:c.firstName||'Unknown',email:c.email||'',days,purchaseDate:pd}; if(days===5) day5.push(row); if(days===7) day7.push(row);} console.log(JSON.stringify({totalEbookBuyers:contacts.length,day5Count:day5.length,day7Count:day7.length,day5,day7},null,2));"

content.partialJson: {"command":"node --input-type=module -e \"import https from 'https'; const token=process.env.GHL_TOKEN||''; const location='TW8JsPW5NMnA3tfK2XLn'; function req(path){return new Promise((resolve,reject)=>{const r=https.request({hostname:'services.leadconnectorhq.com',path,method:'GET',headers:{Authorization:'Bearer '+token,Version:'2021-07-28','Content-Type':'application/json'}},res=>{let b='';res.on('data',d=>b+=d);res.on('end',()=>{try{resolve(JSON.parse(b));}catch{resolve({raw:b});}})});r.on('error',reject);r.end();});} const data=await req('/contacts/?locationId='+location+'&tags=ebook-buyer&limit=100'); const contacts=data.contacts||[]; const now=Date.now(); const day5=[]; const day7=[]; for(const c of contacts){ if((c.tags||[]).includes('course-buyer')) continue; const cf=c.customFields||[]; const pd=(cf.find(f=>f.key==='ebook_purchase_date')||{}).value; if(!pd) continue; const days=Math.floor((now-new Date(pd).getTime())/(24*60*60*1000)); const row={id:c.id,name:c.firstName||'Unknown',email:c.email||'',days,purchaseDate:pd}; if(days===5) day5.push(row); if(days===7) day7.push(row);} console.log(JSON.stringify({totalEbookBuyers:contacts.length,day5Count:day5.length,day7Count:day7.length,day5,day7},null,2));\"","workdir":"C:\\Users\\JeremiahVanWagner\\.openclaw\\workspace-marketing","yieldMs":120000}
